title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!
